verse.name: v1
verse.lines: He was a tough guide who came from the South side Till Jesus took over his life God called him to preached and to boldly proclaim what was right Then the news from the doctor Changed all of the plans he could see You would think that the story would end With a man in defeat

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: But his trials made him strong Brought him close to his God He saw his troubles turned to a victory in love He could have been better Could have made him a quitter But when he suffered long His trials made him strong

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: We often cry And we’re asking God why He heals some but take some away But our time here is God’s and He has a part we must play When my daddy had triumph in love God took him home And when I finished my part Daddy we’ll gonna dance down on those beautiful streets of gold
